metadata.description: Microsoft-native context engineering adaptation with core agent-system mechanisms, Azure and Foundry implementation defaults, and a file-based autonomous research-to-skill operating system with measured router-benchmark results

plugins.name: context-engineering
plugins.description: Microsoft-native adaptation of context engineering for production-grade agent systems. Bundles the core context and harness engineering skills with Azure and Microsoft Foundry defaults for managed hosted agents, Foundry IQ, Foundry Toolbox, Azure AI Search, Fabric, Entra identity, Responsible AI guardrails, publishing, and memory/state. Ships with a researcher operating system (rubrics, mechanism registry, claim provenance, run state machine, adversarial benchmarks, continuous loop).
